Software Engineering Intern (Commercial Software)

Work Term:
Fall 2026
Job Type:
Internship/Co-op
Job Title:
Software Engineering Intern (Commercial Software)
Number of Job Openings:
3
Level:
Intermediate, Senior
Region:
Ontario
Job - City:
Toronto
Job - Province/State:
Ontario
Job - Country:
Canada
Employment Location Arrangement:
Hybrid
Work Term Duration:
4 months
Organization:
Acme Commercial Software Inc.
Job Summary:

Join our Commercial Software team to build the next generation of our SaaS platform. You will work alongside experienced engineers shipping features end-to-end across our TypeScript / React frontend and Go services.

Job Responsibilities:
  • Location: Employment location arrangement will be in-person for our Toronto office.
  • Multiple Openings: We are scaling several teams across our Commercial Software org.
  • Build and ship production features in our React + TypeScript frontend
  • Partner with senior engineers on Go service work
  • Participate in code review, on-call rotation (with a buddy), and release planning
Required Skills:
  • Strong programming fundamentals in at least one of: TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Python
  • Experience with web fundamentals (HTTP, REST, browser DevTools)
  • Comfort working in a Linux/Unix command-line environment
Compensation and Benefits:
$28-32/hour CAD plus benefits
Application Deadline:
June 15, 2026 11:59 PM
Targeted Degrees and Disciplines:
Bachelors - Computer Science, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering
